# Twodragon's Tech Blog

> DevSecOps, Cloud Security, Kubernetes Security technical blog by Twodragon.
> Korean-language content focused on practical security engineering, cloud architecture, and AI coding tools.

## Site Info

- URL: https://tech.2twodragon.com
- Language: Korean (ko-KR)
- Author: Twodragon
- Topics: DevSecOps, Cloud Security, Kubernetes, FinOps, AI Coding, Incident Response
- Total Posts: {{ site.posts | size }}
- Last Updated: {{ site.time | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}

## How to Access Content

- Full content (markdown): [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)
- Individual post (markdown): /api/markdown?path=/posts/YYYY/MM/DD/Title/
- Search API (JSON): /api/search?q=keyword
- RSS Feed: [/feed.xml](/feed.xml)
- Sitemap: [/sitemap.xml](/sitemap.xml)

## Categories

{% assign categories = site.posts | map: "categories" | flatten | uniq | sort %}{% for cat in categories %}- {{ cat }}
{% endfor %}

## Recent Posts (Latest 30)

{% for post in site.posts limit:30 %}- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}): {{ post.excerpt | strip_html | truncate: 150 }} ({{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }})
{% endfor %}

## All Posts

{% endfor %}
